tagline: Turn another year into a celebration of radiant aging.
liner: This mid-tempo G minor groove arrives as an intimate toast for the partner who needs no spotlight to shine. Driven by syncopated rhythms and warm synth pads, smooth R&B vocals run melismatic over euphoric dance beats that elevate joy itself. The lyrics frame time not as a decline but as enhancement; every new age adds beauty rather than fading it. From anticipatory whispers in the intro to cinematic celebrations in the drop, this anthem honors exclusive devotion while blending conversational intimacy with high-energy radiance.
worldCaption: A radiant birthday world where soft midnight air meets euphoric dance beats and warm synth pads celebrating a partner who ages like fine win

bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.
bios.lead: Front and center. Carries the story.
bios.back: The echo that turns a chorus into a crowd.
bios.perc: Texture in the pocket, always moving.
bios.bass: The low end you feel in your chest.
bios.synth: Paints the sky behind the words.
bios.other: Everything you feel but can't name.
bios.keys: Chords that hold the room together.
